meaning: n.<美>牛仔,牧童,美国西部牧人
examples: He shows up in jeans and cowboy boots.
He had sought work as a cowboy, rounding up cattle.
Face it – you'll just have to take those cowboy boots back and ask for a refund.
For a post-drink meal, go downstairs to the Million Dollar Cowboy Steakhouse in the basement.
Take an afternoon stroll to Makawao, a quiet cowboy town that's now a center for artists.
